# RunAnalytics

> AI-powered running analytics platform for serious runners. Integrates with Strava to deliver personalized performance insights, injury-prevention tools, and training plan generation powered by GPT-5.5.

## Key Sections

- [Home](https://aitracker.run/) — Overview and platform entry point
- [AI Running Coach](https://aitracker.run/ai-running-coach) — Conversational AI coach with real-time SSE streaming and full training context
- [AI Agent Coach](https://aitracker.run/ai-agent-coach) — Proactive post-run coaching with personalized recaps and goal tracking
- [Pricing](https://aitracker.run/pricing) — Free and Premium plan details
- [Features](https://aitracker.run/features) — Full feature overview
- [About](https://aitracker.run/about) — Company and mission

## Free Tools

- [Tools Hub](https://aitracker.run/tools) — All free running analytics tools in one place
- [Race Predictor](https://aitracker.run/tools/race-predictor) — Predict finish times using Riegel formula and VDOT
- [Aerobic Decoupling Calculator](https://aitracker.run/tools/aerobic-decoupling-calculator) — Measure aerobic efficiency and cardiac drift
- [Training Split Analyzer](https://aitracker.run/tools/training-split-analyzer) — Analyze easy/hard/long run distribution
- [Marathon Fueling Planner](https://aitracker.run/tools/marathon-fueling) — Personalized race-day nutrition strategy
- [Cadence Analyzer](https://aitracker.run/tools/cadence-analyzer) — Form stability and step rate analysis
- [Running Heatmap](https://aitracker.run/tools/heatmap) — Visual map of all your Strava routes

## Running Shoe Hub

- [Shoe Database](https://aitracker.run/tools/shoes) — 280+ shoes with AI-generated insights, specs, and ratings
- [Shoe Finder](https://aitracker.run/tools/shoe-finder) — Personalized shoe recommendations based on your running profile
- [Rotation Planner](https://aitracker.run/tools/rotation-planner) — Build a smart multi-shoe rotation strategy
- [Shoe Comparison](https://aitracker.run/tools/shoes/compare) — Side-by-side spec and AI insight comparisons

## Blog & Learning

- [Blog Index](https://aitracker.run/blog) — Training guides, AI insights, and gear reviews
- [AI Running Coach — Complete Guide 2026](https://aitracker.run/blog/ai-running-coach-complete-guide-2026)
- [Best Strava Analytics Tools 2026](https://aitracker.run/blog/best-strava-analytics-tools-2026)
- [How to Improve Running Pace](https://aitracker.run/blog/how-to-improve-running-pace)
- [AI Agent Coach — Proactive Coaching](https://aitracker.run/blog/ai-agent-coach-proactive-coaching)
- [How to Pick a Training Plan](https://aitracker.run/blog/how-to-pick-a-training-plan)
- [Ultra Marathon Training Plan — 100-Miler Guide](https://aitracker.run/blog/ultra-marathon-training-plan-100-miler-guide)

- [Developer Portal](https://aitracker.run/developers) — Integration guides and API overview
- [API Documentation](https://aitracker.run/developers/api) — REST API reference for running analytics data
